source_jobs.title: Senior Media Buyer
source_jobs.description:
Pay: CA$60,000.00 - CA$120,000.00 per year

Job description:

Position: Senior Media Buyer (Remote)
Company: Ace1 Media
Website: www.ace1m.com http://www.ace1m.com

About Ace1 Media:
At Ace1 Media, we are a leading digital marketing agency that specializes in search arbitrage, using our deep expertise to drive targeted online traffic and maximize revenue across multiple platforms. As we continue to grow, we are looking for a skilled and experienced Senior Media Buyer to join our team and help us take our campaigns to the next level.

Position Overview:
We are seeking a talented and driven Senior Media Buyer with a focus on search arbitrage to lead and execute high-impact advertising campaigns. In this role, you will work closely with our marketing team to design, implement, and optimize media buying strategies across platforms like TikTok, Facebook, and other emerging digital channels to achieve exceptional ROI.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Lead and Execute Campaign Strategies: Design and implement advanced media buying strategies centered on search arbitrage to maximize ROI and drive performance.

 - Manage and Optimize Campaigns: Take full ownership of campaigns on platforms including TikTok, Facebook, and other digital platforms, constantly refining strategies for maximum efficiency and impact.

 - Collaborate with Teams: Work closely with marketing and creative teams to ensure that ad content is optimized, localized, and aligned with the needs of diverse target audiences.

 - Monitor Performance: Continuously track, analyze, and report on campaign performance to identify areas for improvement, making real-time adjustments to meet key objectives.

 - Stay Ahead of Industry Trends: Keep up-to-date with industry changes, platform algorithm updates, and emerging trends to ensure that our campaigns remain cutting-edge.

 - Budget and Time Management: Effectively manage advertising budgets and timelines, ensuring campaigns are executed within scope and budget while delivering results.

Qualifications:

 - Proven Experience: At least 3+ years of experience in media buying, with a strong focus on search arbitrage and performance-driven campaigns.

 - Platform Expertise: Deep familiarity with TikTok, Facebook, and other digital advertising platforms, with a track record of successful campaign execution.

 - Analytical Skills: Strong analytical abilities with experience in evaluating performance metrics, KPIs, and optimizing based on data-driven insights.

 - Excellent Communication: Outstanding communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.

 - Remote Work Competence: Ability to work independently and manage tasks in a remote work setting with a high level of responsibility and initiative.

 - Educational Background: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field (preferred).

What We Offer:

 - Competitive Salary & Bonuses: Attractive salary with performance-based bonuses that reward results.

 - Growth Opportunities: Be part of a fast-growing company with cutting-edge digital marketing strategies and opportunities to develop professionally.

 - Dynamic Team Culture: Join a multicultural, innovative, and collaborative work environment that values creativity and impact.

Job Type: Full-time

Work Location: Remote

source_jobs.title: Growth Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT US

Ace 1 Media is a fast-growing, technology-driven performance marketing company specializing in AI-powered media automation and scalable monetization strategies. We focus on data, performance, and measurable growth.

We are looking for a results-driven Growth Manager to lead and scale our paid media efforts.


ROLE OVERVIEW

The Growth Manager will be responsible for driving user acquisition, managing paid media campaigns, and optimizing performance across multiple traffic channels. This is a hands-on role ideal for someone with strong media buying experience and a passion for scaling profitable campaigns.

Search arbitrage experience is a strong asset.

This role is remote-friendly but candidates must be based in Vancouver, BC.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Plan, launch, and optimize paid advertising campaigns (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Native, etc.)

 - Manage and scale advertising budgets with a strong focus on ROI and ROAS

 - Develop and execute growth strategies to increase revenue and acquisition

 - Monitor and optimize key metrics: CPA, CAC, ROAS, LTV

 - Conduct A/B testing on creatives, landing pages, and targeting

 - Analyze campaign data and generate performance insights

 - Identify and test new traffic sources and scaling opportunities

Search Arbitrage (Plus):

 - Execute and scale search arbitrage campaigns

 - Optimize keyword bidding strategies and monetization funnels

 - Monitor CPC trends and traffic quality


REQUIREMENTS

 - Minimum 2+ years of experience in digital marketing, performance marketing, or media buying

 - Proven experience managing paid ad campaigns and budgets

 - Strong analytical and data-driven mindset

 - Experience with Google Ads and at least one other paid platform

 - Familiarity with tracking and analytics tools (GA4, Voluum, RedTrack, etc.)

 - Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment


NICE TO HAVE

 - Search arbitrage experience

 - Affiliate marketing background

 - Experience in AdTech or performance-driven environments

 - CRO and landing page optimization experience


COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary (based on experience)

 - Performance-based bonus opportunities

 - Remote flexibility (Vancouver-based candidates only)

 - Opportunity to grow within a scaling media company

 - Pay: CA$60,000.00 - CA$120,000.00 per year

source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Pay: CA$120,000.00 - CA$150,000.00 per year

Job description:

Location: Vancouver, BC
Type: Full-Time
Experience Required: 5+ years

About the Role:

Were looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our team and help build and maintain high-traffic web applications that serve thousands of users daily. Youll play a key role in shaping content delivery and improving ad revenue performance. You'll work closely with our Lead Developer/CTO and contribute directly to business-critical features.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Develop and maintain scalable web applications using modern full-stack technologies

 - Work with product and design teams to implement user-facing features

 - Optimize application performance, SEO, and ad delivery

 - Integrate third-party APIs (e.g., Google Ads, AdSense)

 - Collaborate through code reviews, stand-ups, and sprint planning

 - Monitor application health and user experience using modern observability tools

Required Skills & Experience:

 - 5+ years of full-stack web development experience

 - Strong proficiency in:

 - Node.js, React, PostgreSQL

 - TypeScript

 - Next.js (including SSR and SSG)

Nice-to-Have Skills:

 - Experience with Azure services (Storage, Queues, PostgreSQL, VMs, API Management)

 - Familiarity with BullMQ or similar async workflow tools

 - Background working with ad-based websites

 - Experience using Google Ads / AdSense APIs

 - Knowledge of Playwright for end-to-end testing

 - Experience with FFMPEG for media processing

Tools & Workflow:

 - Git / GitHub

 - Linux-based development environment

 - Jira, Slack

 - Deployment on Vercel

 - Bonus: Experience with monitoring and logging tools like Sentry, LogRocket, or similar

Work Environment:

 - Based in Vancouver, BC

Job Type: Full-time

Application question(s):

 - Are you located in Vancouver or Ontario?

Education:

 - Bachelor's Degree (required)

Experience:

 - Node.js: 3 years (required)

 - Next.js: 1 year (required)

 - React: 3 years (required)

Work Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time

Work Location: Remote

notes: Small sample size, but suggests a mix of marketing and tech roles.
